title: feat(polly): private extensions loader + safer deploy
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Secret compartments
gist.blurb: Polly just got a new hidden pocket! We've added a safe way to load private extensions without mixing them into the public codebase.
gist.summary: Implemented a private extension loader for the Polly bot and updated the rsync deployment script to prevent accidental deletion of VPS-only files.
gist.impact: Maintainers can now safely deploy and run closed-source plugins on the bot's server without altering the public repository.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny detective hat or holding a secret folder, standing next to a server rack or a locked garden gate. The robot companion could be holding a 'top secret' floppy disk.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat, holding a small glowing folder next to a retro server rack. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a floppy disk labeled 'plugins'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
